creator: rob33_me@yahoo.com
text:
this modem works with everything else it is a hardware
 modem and I have it set correctly I was told by
 several people in the newsgroup that this is a bug
 with the software not a configuration problem. Your
 software is not set up to correctly detect isa non-PNP
 modems and it needs to be fixed if someone could tell
 me how to configure it so it will work let me know. I
 have tried changing the port that the modem works on
 to one of the default ports the system sets up and the
 software freezes on hardware detection.
 
 
 =====
 
 Robin E. Hall
 rob33_me@yahoo.com
